items.name: Candidate dumps an OPTIONSAUDIO PPM via screen-switch
items.spec: Extend the candidate's SILENCER_DUMP_SCREEN switch (or whatever clean mechanism the OPTIONS Ralph established) to compose+render the Audio Options screen and write a 640x480 P6 PPM at /tmp/sdl3_dump/screen_00.ppm. main_menu and options screen-switch values must still work unchanged.

items.name: Composition complete (bg + title + Music row + Save/Cancel)
items.spec: The dump shows: bank-6 idx-0 fullscreen background; title overlay 'Audio Options' near top; one Music B220x33 button + off (bank 6 idx 12) + on (bank 6 idx 14) pill indicators; Save and Cancel B196x33 buttons at bottom. Per docs/design/screen-options-audio.md.

items.name: Title overlay rendered correctly (textbank 135, centered, y=14)
items.spec: Title text 'Audio Options' renders via the font path in widget-overlay.md text-mode (literal x,y, no offset), with textbank=135, textwidth=12, x = 320 - len*12/2, y = 14. Glyphs legible, kerning matches reference.

items.name: New widgets render (B220x33 button + off/on pill indicators)
items.spec: The B220x33 button widget paints its 220-px-wide pill with the same anchor convention as B196x33 (top_left = anchor - sprite.offset). The off (bank 6 idx 12) and on (bank 6 idx 14) overlays render at literal coords (420, 137) and (450, 137) respectively. Bank 6 indices 12/14 are added to the candidate's loaded sprite set.

items.name: Visual equivalence to /tmp/real_optionsaudio_dump.ppm
items.spec: Final gate. Candidate PPM is visually equivalent to /tmp/real_optionsaudio_dump.ppm to a casual reader, modulo aliasing / blend-noise / star-RNG / animation-phase nits (<1% pixel difference acceptable).
